sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/autonomy','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff']:

created='2026-05-21 | 15:24 (UTC+3)'
active=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(active.read_text(errors='ignore')) if active.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
data.update({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v6','active':True,'run_id':'bem739_dispatcher_kick','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','watch_scope':'BEM-732 BEM-728 BEM-725 BEM-703','operator_role':'none','kicked_at':created,'kick_reason':'Trigger Codex Runner completion so claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher workflow_run can start Claude'})

handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE DISPATCHER KICKED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'BEM-739 creates a Codex Runner completion event. Next: check claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json for dispatcher start/completion.'+sep)

state_file=Path('governance/state/bem739_kick_claude_dispatcher_via_codex_run.json')

with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem739_kick_claude_dispatcher_via_codex_run','status':'dispatcher_kick_committed','blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
